title: Toronto Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Toronto with a Z-Score of -3.54. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Toronto are extreme, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The city is experiencing a high level of humidity at 72% and moderate winds at 6.9 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 13.4 GG indicates a high demand for heating, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no need for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
